name: cohort-work
description: IndiaNIC Claude Code plugins — design-system extraction and team productivity tools. Powered by cohort.indianic.dev.

plugins.name: create-design-system
plugins.description: Extract a production-ready design system from any public website. Generates a 4-file DESIGN.md folder (DESIGN.md, README.md, preview.html, preview-dark.html) with a 9-section spec, real hex tokens, typography, and interactive light + dark previews. Matches the awesome-design-md repo format.
